title: Wandering Trader DECORATIVE Microblocks
description: Datapack that allows you to purchase a variety of decorative microblocks from the wandering trader
body:
# **DECORATIVE EDITION**

This datapack adds a variety of microblocks to the wandering trader! When a wandering trader spawns, along with his normal trades, he will offer a variety of microblocks for purchase! Currently two edition available, with more planned for the future! Load **one and only one** pack into datapacks folder for use

The DECORATIVE EDITION of this pack contains the following types of microblocks: books, food and drink, household items and decorations, plants and flowers, gaming items, animal heads and plushies

As seen on the hardcore world of [Linkzzey](https://www.twitch.tv/linkzzey)

[FANDOM Edition](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wandering-trader-microblocks) also available, which includes heads from all your favorite characters!

Pack inspired by the Wandering Trades datapack from Vanilla Tweaks
